name: Cathedral Glitch
one_sentence_direction: Treat the material like a sacred object that keeps breaking into ecstatic autocomplete.
palette: Midnight blues, pearl whites, faint crimson accents, luminous highlights.
typography: One stately serif for titles and one clean sans-serif for captions.
motion: Slow push-ins interrupted by sudden micro-jitters and elastic smash-zooms.
transitions: Dip-to-white, frozen frames, abrupt hard cuts after solemn holds.
audio: Reverent pads, choir-like swells, pitch dives, deep impact hits, controlled reverb.
signature_gags: serious titles that collapse into repeated fragments
angelic audio under ridiculous phrases
freeze-frame revelations
guardrails: Keep layouts symmetrical before breaking them.
Use glow sparingly.
Do not flood the frame with more than one gag layer at a time.

name: Browser Baroque
one_sentence_direction: Stage webpages and documents like ornate palace rooms full of tabs, callouts, and petty chaos.
palette: Cream, cobalt, chrome, soft graphite, occasional gold accents.
typography: UI sans-serif paired with monospaced annotations.
motion: Window tiling, scroll whips, cursor choreography, graceful panel slides.
transitions: Tab pops, masked wipes, layered zoom-ins, scroll snaps.
audio: Glossy click sounds, polite notification chimes, sly percussion, page-flip swishes.
signature_gags: too many tabs entering in rhythm
buttons becoming punchlines
scrolling past the important line and snapping back
guardrails: Limit simultaneous windows to three readable layers.
Keep cursor motion elegant rather than frantic.
Use whitespace to preserve premium visual feel.

name: Terminal Confessional
one_sentence_direction: Make the code feel like an intimate, slightly guilty monologue delivered through terminals and stack traces.
palette: Charcoal, phosphor green, cool cyan, occasional warning amber.
typography: Single monospaced family with bold weight changes and carefully sized annotations.
motion: Cursor pulses, token punch-ins, terminal reveals, restrained CRT-like drift.
transitions: Hard cuts, line wipes, glitch blinks, command-enter flashes.
audio: Mechanical key taps, fan hum, subtle digital warble, low dry impacts.
signature_gags: error messages treated like dramatic confessions
variable names looped as mantras
terminal prompts answering each other
guardrails: Keep code large enough to read on a laptop screen.
Do not overuse CRT effects.
Use one accent color for warnings and preserve hierarchy.

name: Kinetic Caption Ballet
one_sentence_direction: Let typography perform the joke with elegant timing, sharp emphasis, and choreographed movement.
palette: High-contrast neutrals with one vivid accent family chosen per render.
typography: One expressive display face plus one highly legible sans-serif for body captions.
motion: Word-by-word entrances, phrase rebounds, tracked pans, rhythmic scaling, disciplined spacing.
transitions: Clean cuts, masked type reveals, shape wipes, occasional snap zoom.
audio: Speech-forward mix with clicky transients, sync hits, and soft bass punctuation.
signature_gags: a single word suddenly becoming huge
captions contradicting the narration
the same phrase returning in different emotional registers
guardrails: Never put more than one long sentence on screen at once.
Break lines for rhythm, not just width.
Let blank space breathe between dense moments.

name: Pastel Panic
one_sentence_direction: Wrap the absurdity in soft, cute, polished surfaces until the emotional instability becomes the joke.
palette: Powder pink, mint, lavender, butter yellow, off-white, selective red warning pops.
typography: Rounded sans-serif for body text with one playful display face for emphasis.
motion: Bouncy slides, sticker-like pops, floaty layers, sudden nervous zooms.
transitions: Soft wipes, sticker pops, ripple reveals, quick squash-and-stretch cuts.
audio: Toy-like plucks, gentle sparkle hits, sudden bass drops, cute sounds used with ironic timing.
signature_gags: pleasant visuals carrying existential lines
tiny reaction stickers amplifying serious claims
sweet pauses before an aggressive cut
guardrails: Do not let the palette become washed out.
Reserve harsh red for one or two shock moments.
Maintain contrast for all captions.

name: VHS Velvet
one_sentence_direction: Use tasteful analog decay and warm nostalgia to make the nonsense feel oddly luxurious.
palette: Warm blacks, faded magenta, tobacco brown, oxidized teal, soft cream.
typography: Condensed sans-serif with occasional retro lower-thirds.
motion: Slow analog drift, gentle zooms, tape wobble, frame holds, sudden reverse stabs.
transitions: Tape glitches, dropouts, burn-ins, noisy cuts, occasional dissolve.
audio: Tape hiss, muffled kicks, slowed stingers, detuned music fragments.
signature_gags: over-serious retro titles
freeze-frames that warp slightly
nostalgic treatment applied to completely unserious material
guardrails: Keep the analog texture subtle enough that text stays readable.
Avoid stacking multiple noise layers.
Use blur and softness only on selected beats.

name: Keynote Meltdown
one_sentence_direction: Start with high-end presentation polish and let the deck slowly unravel into beautiful sabotage.
palette: White, graphite, electric blue, restrained coral, polished gradients.
typography: Modern geometric sans-serif with presentation-style hierarchy.
motion: Smooth deck transitions, chart zooms, clean panel builds, then increasingly unhinged interruptions.
transitions: Slide pushes, elegant fades, x/y axis wipes, then sudden hard cuts.
audio: Corporate sting beds, bright UI ticks, then warped drops and exaggerated whooshes.
signature_gags: charts treated as emotional outbursts
bullet points turning accusatory
clean slides interrupted by feral captions
guardrails: Keep the opening genuinely polished.
Escalate sabotage gradually.
Preserve alignment and grid discipline until the break point.

name: Opera of Errors
one_sentence_direction: Edit the material like a prestige trailer for a catastrophic misunderstanding.
palette: Black, silver, deep red, storm gray, hard white highlights.
typography: Cinematic serif titles with concise sans-serif support captions.
motion: Dramatic punch-ins, slow-motion holds, black-frame beats, decisive crash zooms.
transitions: Trailer-style hits, impact cuts, long silences, title cards, dramatic fades to black.
audio: Orchestral booms, trailer braams, sudden silence, whispered lines, over-serious crescendos.
signature_gags: one tiny detail framed as destiny
dead-serious title cards for trivial problems
abrupt silence after maximal hype
guardrails: Use black frames sparingly.
Let the trailer logic stay readable.
Do not overfill every beat with impacts.
